allow: PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; Start-Process "msedge" "http://localhost:3000" -WindowStyle Maximized; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; $screen = [System.Windows.Forms.Screen]::PrimaryScreen.Bounds; $bmp = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap\($screen.Width, $screen.Height\); $g = [System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage\($bmp\); $g.CopyFromScreen\($screen.Location, [System.Drawing.Point]::Empty, $screen.Size\); $path = "$env:TEMP\\map_check.png"; $bmp.Save\($path\); $g.Dispose\(\); $bmp.Dispose\(\); Write-Output $path)

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $screen = [System.Windows.Forms.Screen]::PrimaryScreen.Bounds; $bmp = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap\($screen.Width, $screen.Height\); $g = [System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage\($bmp\); $g.CopyFromScreen\($screen.Location, [System.Drawing.Point]::Empty, $screen.Size\); $path = "$env:TEMP\\map_check2.png"; $bmp.Save\($path\); $g.Dispose\(\); $bmp.Dispose\(\); Write-Output $path)
